source_intake_record.raw_question_text: <image_1>A conducting loop of wire that is initially around a magnet is pulled away from the magnet to the right, as indicated in the figure, inducing a current in the loop. What is the direction of the force on the magnet and the direction of the magnetic field at the center of the loop due to the induced current?Force on the Magnet/Magnetic Field at Center of Loop due To Induced Current

choice_map.D: No direction; the force is zero./To the left

extraction_notes: answer field is an option letter and was mapped to the corresponding option text
image is present as a PIL object placeholder, not as a path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths contains 1 image path

image_dependency: 题干明确写到“as indicated in the figure”，并要求根据磁铁与线圈的相对位置和运动方向判断结果。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要依赖图示而非纯文本。
问题涉及空间方向（磁铁在右侧拉开、力方向、线圈中心磁场方向），这类空间关系通常需要看图确认。
multi_step: 需要先根据磁铁远离线圈判断磁通变化，再用楞次定律确定感应电流产生的磁场方向。
还需要进一步从感应相互作用推出磁铁所受力方向，因此至少包含两个关联推理步骤。
答案包含两个输出槽位（force on the magnet / magnetic field at center of loop），不是单一步骤即可直接读出的结论。
verifiability: 存在4个明确选项，标准答案与选项A完全对应，结果可直接核验。
answer_type=short_text，但答案格式固定为“方向 / 方向”，判定边界较清晰。
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，且题目、图片、答案都已登记存在，可支持后续规则化检查。

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths contains 1 image path

decision_reasons: 题干、图片、答案均已存在，核心语义资产完整，不属于缺少支撑信息的样本。
综合信号较强：image_dependency_score=0.94、multi_step_score=0.72、verifiability_score=0.91，适合进入候选池。
当前风险主要是元数据字段不一致（metadata.image_paths 为空但顶层 image_paths 有图），属于登记一致性问题，不影响题目核心内容恢复。
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，且该题图像依赖明确、答案可核验，整体质量更接近 keep 而非 low_priority。
